## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions and clicks are steadily increasing, validating the content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Shifting focus to higher volume, moderate difficulty keywords to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Need to align on specific traffic/conversion targets to inform strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Exploring addition of author bios to boost credibility and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [10 new articles published since last week](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [8 articles in final review, 4 in text review](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Production pace increasing; will soon be ahead of schedule](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [New batch of non-text articles submitted directly to final review](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions compounding since June, indicating successful indexing](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Clicks increasing, but at a lower rate than impressions (as expected)](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Traffic improving significantly compared to weeks prior](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Current focus on low difficulty, moderate-to-low volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Shifting strategy to include higher volume, moderate difficulty keywords (e.g., 48/100 difficulty, 1000 monthly searches)](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Growth Strategy Discussion

  - [Kyle suggests experimenting with higher volume keywords to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aiming for \~100 clicks per week as a near-term benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Need to clarify specific traffic/conversion targets to inform strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Considering the balance between low-hanging fruit and more competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Data Interpretation and Reporting

  - [Clarified metrics like average engagement time and event count](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Discussed potential issues with Google Search Console API affecting some report data](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Explained why average position might increase while still indicating positive growth](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

### Content Enhancement Ideas

  - [Proposal to add author bios to articles, linking to expert profiles on Town website](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Suggestion to incorporate middle and bottom of funnel content focusing on AI and tax filing from Town's perspective](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

### Collaboration with First Round

  - [Upcoming discussion on ad testing for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Targeting 100+ direct web customers for the tax season](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Kyle offered expertise in paid advertising strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jean-Denis to review one content piece per day for the next 10 days](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Share rough forecast and organic traffic targets with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Explore implementation of author bios for articles](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Develop strategy for incorporating middle/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Continue refining keyword strategy to include higher volume opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Collaborate on paid advertising strategy with Kyle's input](https://fathom.video/share/mMKHUQ5xLWST7G1qXjFhFpHoDLuZv7bf?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
